khalij-knowledgebase.name: Iranian Music Knowledge Base
khalij-knowledgebase.author: Ardavan Khalij
khalij-knowledgebase.basedOn: Dariush Talai's transcription of Mirza Abdollah's radif
khalij-knowledgebase.coverage: Complete Radif of Mirza Abdollah: 7 dastgahs, 260 gooshehs with MIDI files and JSON structure including ist, shahed, modulation targets, and importance ratings

shafiei-midi.name: Radif MIDI Files
shafiei-midi.author: Dr. Sepideh Shafiei
shafiei-midi.basedOn: Dariush Talai's transcription, generated from Finale notation
shafiei-midi.coverage: MIDI files of Mirza Abdollah's radif with pitch bends for neutral tones
shafiei-midi.citation: Shafiei, S. (2021). Extracting Theory from Practice: A Computational Analysis of the Persian Radif (Doctoral dissertation, City University of New York).

shafiei-theoretical-talai.name: Theoretical Tables (Talai)
shafiei-theoretical-talai.author: Dr. Sepideh Shafiei (compiling Dariush Talai's analysis)
shafiei-theoretical-talai.basedOn: Dariush Talai's musicological analysis of pitch ranges and functional notes
shafiei-theoretical-talai.coverage: Excel spreadsheets with range and functional notes per goosheh for all dastgahs, according to Talai
shafiei-theoretical-talai.citation: Shafiei, S. (2021). radif-theoretical-tables [Dataset]. GitHub. Based on Talai, D. (2000). Traditional Persian Art Music: The Radif of Mirza Abdollah. Mazda Publishers.

shafiei-theoretical-jafarzadeh.name: Theoretical Tables (Ja'farzadeh)
shafiei-theoretical-jafarzadeh.author: Dr. Sepideh Shafiei (compiling Ja'farzadeh's analysis)
shafiei-theoretical-jafarzadeh.basedOn: Ja'farzadeh's musicological analysis of pitch ranges and functional notes
shafiei-theoretical-jafarzadeh.coverage: Excel spreadsheets with range and functional notes per goosheh for all dastgahs, according to Ja'farzadeh

farhat-dastgah-concept.name: The Dastgah Concept in Persian Music
farhat-dastgah-concept.author: Hormoz Farhat
farhat-dastgah-concept.coverage: Definitive theoretical framework: 17-tone unequal scale, interval analysis, four primary tetrachords, modulation theory
farhat-dastgah-concept.citation: Farhat, H. (1990). The Dastgah Concept in Persian Music. Cambridge University Press.

talai-transcription.name: Traditional Persian Art Music: The Radif of Mirza Abdollah
talai-transcription.author: Dariush Talai
talai-transcription.basedOn: Oral tradition of Mirza Abdollah as transmitted through master-student lineage
talai-transcription.coverage: 617 pages, 238 gooshehs in staff notation across 7 dastgahs and 5 avazes. The most comprehensive published transcription of Mirza Abdollah's radif.
talai-transcription.citation: Talai, D. (2000). Traditional Persian Art Music: The Radif of Mirza Abdollah. Mazda Publishers.

ableton-tuning.name: Ableton Tuning System: Persian Radif
ableton-tuning.author: Ableton
ableton-tuning.coverage: Per-dastgah tuning presets with interval tables (90, 135, 165, 204, 270 cents) and scale degree functions
ableton-tuning.citation: Ableton. (2024). Tuning System: Persian Radif. https://tuning.ableton.com/persian-radif/
